title: Interactive Canvas Motion & Micro-interactions
promptText:
Generate a dark-mode interactive infinite canvas UI with draggable node cards, subtle spring physics, hover glow effects, and smooth zoom pan controls.

### Technical Details:
- Feature: Interactive Canvas Motion & Micro-interactions (Infinite Canvas)
- Workflow Focus: Fluid vector transformation, drag-and-drop node physics, and instant prompt-to-UI animated state transitions.
- Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion / WebGL.
- Key Elements: Vector canvas transforms, stateful loaders, theme switching, responsive container cards.

title: Glassmorphism UI Component Suite
promptText:
Build a sleek glassmorphic dashboard section featuring backdrop blur, 1px white/10 border highlights, modern typography, and responsive grid layout.

### Technical Details:
- Feature: Glassmorphism UI Component Suite (Design System)
- Workflow Focus: Translucent UI cards, backdrop-blur sidebars, neon accent borders, and dynamic multi-state form controls.
- Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion / WebGL.
- Key Elements: Vector canvas transforms, stateful loaders, theme switching, responsive container cards.

title: AI Prompt-to-Mockup Flow Generator
promptText:
Create a live prompt input widget with animated shimmering gradient border, pill selector tags, and streaming preview card container.

### Technical Details:
- Feature: AI Prompt-to-Mockup Flow Generator (AI Workflow)
- Workflow Focus: Real-time streaming UI generation preview animation with skeleton loaders, syntax highlighting, and visual component branching.
- Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion / WebGL.
- Key Elements: Vector canvas transforms, stateful loaders, theme switching, responsive container cards.

title: SaaS Hero & Interactive Feature Showcase
promptText:
Design a high-converting SaaS hero section with headline text, action buttons, integrated video/demo player frame, and subtle floating card animations.

### Technical Details:
- Feature: SaaS Hero & Interactive Feature Showcase (Landing Page)
- Workflow Focus: Modern landing page hero section with animated floating UI mockup widgets, interactive tab switcher, and glow particle backdrop.
- Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion / WebGL.
- Key Elements: Vector canvas transforms, stateful loaders, theme switching, responsive container cards.

title: Dark / Light Mode Theme Switching Engine
promptText:
Implement a smooth theme switcher component supporting system preference, manual override, and zero-flash CSS variable color theme loading.

### Technical Details:
- Feature: Dark / Light Mode Theme Switching Engine (Themeing & Controls)
- Workflow Focus: Seamless color token transitions, instant local storage persistence, and accessible contrast ratios for light (#FAFAFA) and dark (#0F0F0F) UI themes.
- Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion / WebGL.
- Key Elements: Vector canvas transforms, stateful loaders, theme switching, responsive container cards.
